ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Completed, Postponed, Canceled) */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field where the game was played (e.g., @Neutral, @Texas Christian) */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed by the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "run_difference" INTEGER /* Difference in runs between the team and the opponent */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game was played in */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the team represents */,
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game attendance entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game weather entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES game_weather ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_attendance_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendance_id") REFERENCES game_attendance ("attendance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the opponent team was founded */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the opponent team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that won the championship in the season */,
  "top_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top player of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the field */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the field */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., Grass, Artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the log belongs to */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Inning number */,
  "inning_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the inning */,
  "inning_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the inning */,
  "inning_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inning in minutes */,
  "play_by_play" TEXT /* Play-by-play details of the inning */,
  "inning_score" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the inning */,
  "inning_allowed" INTEGER /* Runs allowed in the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "batting_order" TEXT /* Batting order of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the player represents */,
  "DOB" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of RBIs */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the coach represents */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's tenure */,
  "DOB" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the coach */,
  "coaching_awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coaching staff entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the staff entry belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "responsibility" TEXT /* Specific responsibilities of the coach (e.g., Pitching Coach, Hitting Coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Full name of the umpire */,
  "umpire_type" TEXT /* Type of umpire (e.g., Home Plate, Base) */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the umpire */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as an umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the umpire officiates */,
  "umpire_type" TEXT /* Type of umpire (e.g., Home Plate, Base) */,
  "umpire_experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the umpire (e.g., Novice, Experienced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the team represents */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "total_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed */,
  "ERA" REAL /* Earned Run Average */,
  "team_batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the team */,
  "team_fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the game */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation during the game */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_weather_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "gate_revenue" REAL /* Gate revenue generated */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees if exact count is not available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
